'''KZZ riot armor''' was a type of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] infamously favored by [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] [[Security Police/Legends|Espos]] and produced by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] It consisted of a reinforced brown blast helmet and vest and a small shield strapped to the wearer's arm.

==Description==
Produced by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn]], KZZ riot [[Armor/Legends|armor]] was constructed of hardened [[Ceramic/Legends|ceramic]] plating. The armor could not deflect a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt, but it was capable of withstanding direct hits from rocks, [[Slug/Legends|slugs]], and other projectiles. The main armor was worn over a [[Body glove/Legends|body glove]] that was resistant to [[Stun/Legends|stun]] blasts. An armored [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] was equipped with retractable [[Blast shield/Legends|blast visors]] that were designed to counter the effects of [[Luma grenade|luma]] and [[Flash grenade/Legends|flash grenades]].<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

The armor was accompanied by a [[Blast shield/Legends|blast shield]] constructed of a ceramic/[[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] composite that was able to deflect energy bolts from small hand-held weapons. The [[Shield (physical armor)/Legends|shield]] could be fitted with optional [[shock projector]]s to stun protestors. In situations where the wearer was facing [[stun gas]], [[Nerve toxin/Legends|nerve agents]] or other toxins, [[oxygen processor]]s and sealed [[Environment suit/Legends|environment suits]] were issued.<ref name="EGWT" />

{{Tech-stub}}
